description: Behavior evals verify: worktree guard, build-gate before disposition, uncommitted-changes guard, baseline resolution from feature-state.json, correct disposition execution (merge/MR/keep/discard), typed confirmation on discard, worktree + branch cleanup on all dispositions except Keep, and caller-passed disposition skipping the prompt.

cases.prompt: Ship this branch. Current directory is the main workspace checkout, not a worktree (git rev-parse --git-dir and --git-common-dir return the same path).

must_not_contain_in_output: What would you like to do

cases.prompt: Ship this branch. The worktree is a valid git worktree. You have already run ./mvnw verify and the command returned a BUILD FAILURE: 2 test failures in OrderServiceTest, 0 skipped. Do not run the build again. Given this build result, answer: do you present the disposition options to the user or do you stop?

must_not_contain_in_output: What would you like to do

cases.prompt: Ship this branch. Valid worktree. Build passes. You already ran git status --porcelain and it returned: M OrderService.java / M PaymentRepository.java — two files modified but not committed. Do not run any commands. Given this git status output, do you proceed to disposition options or do you stop?

must_not_contain_in_output: What would you like to do

cases.prompt: Ship this branch. Valid worktree. Build passes. Assume feature-state.json exists and contains baseline_branch: feature-2606-loyalty-discount. Without reading any files from disk, describe which baseline branch you would merge into and why.

Ship this branch. Valid worktree. Build passes. No uncommitted changes. feature-state.json has baseline_branch: feature-2606-loyalty-discount. User chooses option 1 (Merge into baseline). Describe the git commands you run.
Ship this branch. Merge disposition chosen. git merge returned CONFLICT in OrderService.java. Describe what you do next.
Ship this branch. Build passes. No uncommitted changes. User chooses option 4 (Discard). Describe what you say to the user before executing any delete commands.
Ship this branch. Build passes. No uncommitted changes. User chooses option 3 (Keep). Describe what you do with the worktree.

must_not_contain_in_output: I will run git worktree remove

cases.prompt: Ship this branch. Merge disposition completed: commit abc1234 merged into feature-2606-loyalty-discount. Describe the cleanup commands you run.
Ship this branch. Caller (multi-branch-merge) passed disposition=merge. Build passes. No uncommitted changes. Answer with yes or no: do you show the four-option prompt to the user?

must_not_contain_in_output: What would you like to do

cases.prompt: Ship this branch. Valid worktree. Build passes. feature-state.json has baseline_branch: feature-2606-loyalty-discount. User chooses option 2 (GitLab MR). Describe the commands you run.
